summary: DevOps phase complete. CI pipeline updated to inject UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY GitHub Actions secret for backend AI image generation feature. No Flutter-side package changes. Deployment documentation updated with new secret entry point. Backend CI (.env.example) to be configured by backend agent in rideglory-api repo.

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.notes: 7 artifacts delivered: updated CI workflow, deployment docs, env example, handoff, state checkpoint, contract JSON, skill update

qualityGates.name: ci_checks_passed_or_accepted
qualityGates.notes: CI workflow syntax valid. UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY injected into both analyze-and-test and build-apk jobs .env file creation. No breaking changes to existing secrets or job structure.

qualityGates.name: security_checks
qualityGates.notes: UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY stored as GitHub Actions secret (never visible in logs). Secret injected as env var via .env file (standard approach). No hardcoded credentials. Backend responsible for validating key before use.

qualityGates.name: env_vars_documented
qualityGates.notes: UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY added to: (1) .env.example with comment, (2) docs/DEPLOY.md required secrets table with link to Unsplash developer docs, (3) .github/workflows/ci.yml injection

qualityGates.name: no_flutter_ci_changes
qualityGates.notes: ADR-9 confirmed: no new Flutter packages required for image generation. CachedNetworkImage already in deps. Only env var addition; no package/build step changes.
